title: Less Serious Offenses and Penalties for Seafarer Contractual Violations
content:
B. LESS SERIOUS OFFENSES:

1. Default on its contractual obligations to the seafarer and/or to its manning agent.
2. Substitution of the POEA-approved contract.
3. Withholding of the seafarer's travel and other pertinent documents.
4. Violation of other laws, rules and regulations on recruitment and placement.

Penalty:

1st Offense - Fine of Php50,000.00
2nd Offense - Fine of Php100,000.00
3rd Offense - Suspension from participation in the overseas employment program (Six months to One year)
4th Offense - Permanent Disqualification and delisting from the roster of accredited principals/employers
